description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin set on a rectangular grassy plot. The cabin features a gable roof made of corrugated metal, with a slight overhang on all sides. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and there is a single door centered on the front facade, accessed by a short set of steps. Two small rectangular windows are symmetrically placed on each side wall, providing natural light to the interior. A small uncovered porch area is present at the entrance, with a couple of crates or boxes placed nearby. The cabin sits elevated slightly above the ground, supported by visible foundation blocks.
description: A small wooden cabin with a gable metal roof, centered front door, side windows, and a short entry porch on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabin's wooden planks, two small windows, and the entry porch with crates visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the centered door, entry steps, and the gable roof's symmetry.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with two small windows and the porch area partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back wall with no windows or doors.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with corrugated metal panels and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Two small rectangular windows symmetrically placed on each side wall; no windows on the front or rear facades
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, accessed by steps
